title: Kevin Presto
compiled_truth: Kevin Presto is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-17), Kevin Presto sent 218 and received 1080 emails, totalling 1298 interactions.
